title: agrostis stolonifera var. marina
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. marina, also known as sea bent or beach bent, is a variety of creeping bentgrass that is commonly found in coastal areas and estuaries. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. marina include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to protect against certain infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential interactions.
